title: agoseris heterophylla var. turgida
intro: Agoseris heterophylla var. turgida, also known as Turgid Agoseris or Desert Turgid Mariposa Daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agoseris heterophylla var. turgida include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
